judge_reason: Description A describes a fragmented object or lights and power lines, while Description B describes a disc-shaped object and a caption 'UFO - PICTURES' which A does not mention.
original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph depicting a dark, blurred sky. In the lower portion, a series of white, bright lights or a single fragmented object is visible against the dark background. Faint horizontal lines, likely power lines, are visible in the foreground.
